regime_fall.current_status: U.S. and Israeli air campaign has struck approximately 9,000 Iranian targets with operations nearing completion, while major amphibious and ground force deployments (USS Tripoli with 3,500 personnel, USS Boxer contingent, and 82nd Airborne preparations) position forces for potential ground operations; the military-dominated regime under Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei continues rejecting ceasefire terms despite massive naval and missile capability degradation, nationwide internet blackout, and ongoing but depleted Iranian missile and drone counterattacks.
regime_fall.last_major_event: USS Tripoli (LHA-7) and 31st Marine Expeditionary Unit entered CENTCOM area on March 27, 2026, with approximately 3,500 sailors and Marines, significantly expanding ground operation capacity alongside ongoing Pentagon planning for 82nd Airborne deployment.
